<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Let me check the current state more carefully
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')

# Check all rows with w elements in the right panel
print("Right panel w elements:")
for i in range(32, 51):
    row_str = ascii_lines[i][38:56]
    if 'w' in row_str or 'W' in row_str:
        print(f"Row {i}: '{row_str}'")

# I see that horizontal bars are at rows 33, 39, 45
# And vertical bars are at rows 35-37, 41-43, 47-49
# Each column has 1 horizontal bar and 1 vertical bar (3 pixels each)

# The yellow shapes indicate columns 2 and 3
# I've removed horizontal bars at columns 2 and 3 in row 33
# Let me remove horizontal bars at columns 2 and 3 in rows 39 and 45

# Column 2 center: col 44
# Column 3 center: col 50

# Remove horizontal bars at rows 39 and 45, columns 2 and 3
action([
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 39, 'col': 44},
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 39, 'col': 50},
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 45, 'col': 44},
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 45, 'col': 50}
])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
